description: Slack Web API integration for workspace communication and collaboration. Supports channel management, message posting and retrieval, threaded conversations, user profile lookups, search across messages and files, and emoji reactions. Requires a Bot Token (xoxb-) with appropriate OAuth scopes.
use_case: Team messaging, channel management, conversation history retrieval, threaded discussion tracking, user directory lookup, workspace-wide search, emoji reactions for feedback, and automated notifications.
